title: Instagram Follow Tracker
description: Privacy-first analytics tool that helps users identify unfollowers, mutual follows, and fans from Instagram data exports. All processing happens locally in the browser — zero data sent to servers.
problem: Users needed a safe way to analyze Instagram follow data without third-party apps.
solution: Built a client-side HTML parser with visual dashboard for follow analysis.
impact: 100% private — zero data leaves the user's browser

title: WarungKu — Smart UMKM Platform
description: End-to-end food business management platform with digital POS, menu management, real-time sales reports, and online ordering system — designed specifically for small business owners.
problem: Small food businesses needed an affordable, modern management system.
solution: Built a full-stack platform with POS, reporting, and online ordering.
impact: Streamlined operations for UMKM food businesses

title: Rumah BUMN Banjarmasin
description: Professional company profile website for Rumah BUMN Banjarmasin, showcasing services, events, and organizational information with a clean, trustworthy design.
problem: Organization needed a professional online presence to attract members.
solution: Designed and developed a clean, informative company profile site.
impact: Established credible digital presence for the organization

title: Short Movie — Kurihing Cindai Alus
description: Cinematic short film production for Desa Cindai Alus — combining storytelling, cinematography, and professional editing to showcase local culture and heritage.

description: Promotional video for BEM FTI UNISKA Banjarmasin — Kabinet Tomodachi. Dynamic editing with motion graphics and trendy transitions.

title: Kisah Sandi Kantan Sasirangan
